title: Pure Silicone Oil 30ml – For Acrylic Paint Pouring, Treadmills, Sewing Machines, 3D Printers, Fishing Reels & More – Non-Toxic, Odourless, Long-Lasting Lubricant
features: PURE & PREMIUM FORMULA – 100% pure silicone oil for consistent, smooth performance in lubrication and creative projects.
ACRYLIC POURING ART READY – Popular choice among artists for creating beautiful cells and effects in fluid acrylic paintings.
MULTI-PURPOSE USE – Works perfectly for treadmills, sewing machines, locks, 3D printers, and precision tools.
LONG-LASTING & SAFE – Non-toxic, odourless, and non-reactive, offering durable protection without staining or attracting dust
EASY 30ML BOTTLE – Compact, precise applicator for controlled use in art studios, workshops, or home maintenance.
description: Atkinson Oil Co. Pure Silicone Oil 30 ml is a versatile, high-quality solution trusted by both artists and technicians. Made from 100% pure silicone, it delivers exceptional results whether you’re creating fluid art masterpieces or maintaining your equipment. For artists, this silicone oil is a go-to for acrylic paint pouring, helping produce vibrant cells and stunning effects in fluid paintings. For maintenance and repairs, it provides smooth, long-lasting lubrication for treadmills, sewing machines, 3D printers, and other precision tools. Non-toxic, odourless, and mess-free, this silicone oil ensures reliable performance without staining surfaces or attracting dirt. The compact 30 ml bottle with precision tip makes application easy, whether in your art studio or workshop.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Acrylic paint pouring for creating cells and fluid art effects, Lubrication for treadmills, sewing machines, and 3D printers, Maintenance of fishing reels, locks, hinges, and precision tools, Protection for rubber seals, O-rings, and gaskets, Resin art for separation and detailing
specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Designed for artists and makers to create striking cells in acrylic pour paintings, lubricate treadmill belts for smoother operation, maintain sewing machines, protect rubber seals and O-rings, and keep locks, hinges, and precision tools moving freely.
